title: Reflection
text:
Developing this ePortfolio has been one of the most rewarding learning experiences of my university journey. It allowed me to combine business thinking, creativity, and digital skills into one professional platform that represents my identity and future ambitions.






Note



This project was not only about creating a website. It was about building a professional presence for future career opportunities.




Through this project, I developed valuable technical skills:

Quarto website development

Git and version control

GitHub publishing workflow

Website layout and styling

File organisation and project structure

I also strengthened important professional skills:

Planning and time management

Problem solving

Attention to detail

Communication through design

Personal branding




At the start, I found YAML formatting, folder structure, and rendering errors difficult. Small mistakes in file syntax often caused pages to break. Instead of giving up, I learned how to debug problems step by step, test changes carefully, and improve through practice.
This experience taught me that persistence and patience are essential in digital project work.

title: Applegreen Consumer Behaviour Project
text:
This university project analysed customer behaviour for Applegreen to understand consumer expectations and service improvement opportunities.



Conducted customer interviews

Studied buying patterns

Analysed customer priorities

Presented recommendations

Product choice

Customer experience
















The project improved my understanding of how customer data can guide retail growth and loyalty strategies.

title: Ryanair People Management Study
text:
This project involved working with 22 students to evaluate the people management approach of Ryanair.



Employee motivation
Leadership style
Workforce productivity
Operational efficiency





Conducted secondary research
Structured presentation slides
Delivered findings in group presentation






Code
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

factors = ["Training","Leadership","Rewards","Culture"]
scores = [8,7,6,8]

plt.figure(figsize=(8,5))
plt.plot(factors, scores, marker="o")
plt.title("Employee Performance Drivers")
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()












Strong people management creates better service quality and lower employee turnover.

title: Power BI Assignment
text:
This university group project used Microsoft Power BI to analyse GlobalMart Ltd transactional business data over a multi year period.
The objective was to identify insights related to:

Profitability trends

Sector performance

Sales representative effectiveness

Revenue patterns

Cost efficiency

title: Power BI Assignment
text:
This university group project used Microsoft Power BI to analyse GlobalMart Ltd transactional business data over a multi year period.
The objective was to identify insights related to:

Profitability trends

Sector performance

Sales representative effectiveness

Revenue patterns

Cost efficiency

title: Power BI Assignment
text:
Tools Used

Microsoft Power BI

DAX Measures

Data Cleaning

Dashboard Design

Business Reporting

title: Power BI Assignment
text:
Key Findings

Education sector was most profitable

Agriculture sector underperformed

Discount strategy reduced margins

Sales rep performance varied strongly

Profit linked more to margin than volume
